concierge.title: Wednesday — Mid-Week Check
notes: 🏆 RISE Challenge (Virginia) — Stability accepted! Complete the application
🎤 InnovateSouth deck — finish it, time the pitch (must be under 4 min), upload to Claude for evaluation & improvements
📊 Review Reyla progress vs. week goals
📬 Clear inbox — flag anything from Burton or partners
🏗️ InkThorn: review leads pipeline, any follow-ups?
🌮 Magazine Street lunch run — you've earned it
✍️ Journal check-in: what's working, what's not

private: 💌 Put the phone away at dinner
💬 Check in with Camille today — not just a quick text
